response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: For Song 1 (Monopoly), reference lyrics were null, so manual transcription was fully applied based on audio and on-screen lyric text. For Song 2 (Katsushika Rhapsody), the reference lyrics perfectly matched the audio.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Song 2 reference lyrics, and discarded Song 1's null status by transcribing 100% manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual titles at the start of each song. Rapid transitions and continuous delivery in Song 1's fast sections were strictly handled using immediate transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: モノポリー
subtitles.english: Monopoly

subtitles.original: 魅惑の言葉通り
subtitles.english: Just as the charming words say,

subtitles.original: 裏面に忍ばせた
subtitles.english: hidden on the reverse side...

subtitles.original: 1mgのスパイス
subtitles.english: is a 1mg spice.

subtitles.original: たちまち華麗な
subtitles.english: Instantly, with elegant...

subtitles.original: 指先で彩る
subtitles.english: ...fingertips, I color...

subtitles.original: 本日のダイス
subtitles.english: ...today's dice.

subtitles.original: 当たり見て妥協してちゃ
subtitles.english: If you settle just by looking at the wins,

subtitles.original: 生き残れないでしょう
subtitles.english: you won't survive, will you?

subtitles.original: 率直に言って
subtitles.english: To be frank,

subtitles.original: その全てが欲しい
subtitles.english: I want all of it.

subtitles.original: 一人勝ちにオールイン
subtitles.english: All-in for a solo victory.

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない Duet
subtitles.english: No matter what happens, isn't it fine?

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, are there?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して 翻弄されて ゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying with, being toyed with, getting thrills.

subtitles.original: 喰らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if I get taken down, it's what I want, right?

subtitles.original: 最低だって滾るでしょ
subtitles.english: Even at the worst, it's thrilling, right?

subtitles.original: 見透かして 見透かされて 故に 終わりは無い
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, therefore there is no end.

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: All of this throbbing is non-fiction.

subtitles.original: 嗜むはずでも
subtitles.english: Even if I only meant to enjoy a little,

subtitles.original: たまには飲みすぎて
subtitles.english: sometimes I drink too much,

subtitles.original: 1回休み
subtitles.english: and lose a turn.

subtitles.original: 周りもざわつく
subtitles.english: Making those around me stir,

subtitles.original: 思わぬうたた寝で
subtitles.english: due to an unexpected nap,

subtitles.original: 2回休み
subtitles.english: lose two turns.

subtitles.original: 切れる手札と勘だけじゃ
subtitles.english: With just playable cards and intuition alone,

subtitles.original: 手に入らないもの
subtitles.english: some things are unobtainable.

subtitles.original: 速攻で行って
subtitles.english: Going with a swift attack,

subtitles.original: 見逃されるならいい
subtitles.english: it's fine if it's overlooked.

subtitles.original: 命懸けで楽しむわ
subtitles.english: I'll enjoy this with my life on the line.

subtitles.original: 天と地は案外近い
subtitles.english: Heaven and earth are surprisingly close.

subtitles.original: 「この通り」
subtitles.english: Just as you see,

subtitles.original: 命懸け
subtitles.english: putting my life on the line.

subtitles.original: されどモノポリー_text
subtitles.english: Yet, it's Monopoly.

subtitles.original: されどおじゃり
subtitles.english: And so, we feast,

subtitles.original: 秘める想い
subtitles.english: my hidden feelings...

subtitles.original: 今宵私は強い
subtitles.english: tonight, I am strong!

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない
subtitles.english: No matter what happens, isn't it fine?

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, are there?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して 翻弄されて ゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying with, being toyed with, getting thrills.

subtitles.original: 喰らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if I get taken down, it's what I want, right?

subtitles.original: 最低だって滾るでしょ
subtitles.english: Even at the worst, it's thrilling, right?

subtitles.original: 見透かして 見透かされて 故に 終わりは無い
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, therefore there is no end.

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: All of this throbbing is non-fiction.

subtitles.original: 落ちても昇ってもノンフィクション
subtitles.english: Whether falling or rising, it's non-fiction.

subtitles.original: 葛飾ラプソディー
subtitles.english: Katsushika Rhapsody

subtitles.original: 中川に浮かぶ 夕陽をめがけて
subtitles.english: Aiming at the setting sun floating on the Nakagawa River,

subtitles.original: 小石を蹴ったら 靴まで飛んで
subtitles.english: when I kicked a pebble, even my shoe flew off.

subtitles.original: ジョギングしていた 大工の頭領に
subtitles.english: The master carpenter who was jogging

subtitles.original: ガキのまんまだと 笑われたのさ
subtitles.english: laughed at me, saying I'm still a kid.

subtitles.original: どこかに元気を 落っことしても
subtitles.english: Even if I drop my energy somewhere,

subtitles.original: 葛飾亀有 アクビをひとつ
subtitles.english: in Katsushika Kameari, I let out a yawn.

subtitles.original: 変わらない町並みが 妙にやさしいよ保存用
subtitles.english: The unchanging townscape is strangely kind.

subtitles.original: 中央広場で 子供の手を引く
subtitles.english: Pulling a child's hand in the central square,

subtitles.original: 太ったあの娘は 初恋の彼女
subtitles.english: that plump girl was my first love.

subtitles.original: ゴンパチ池で 渡したラブレター保存用
subtitles.english: The love letter I gave her at Gonpachi Pond,

subtitles.original: 今も持ってると からかわれたよ
subtitles.english: she teased me, saying she still has it.

subtitles.original: 何にもいいこと なかったけど
subtitles.english: Nothing good really happened, but

subtitles.original: 葛飾水元 流れる雲と
subtitles.english: with the drifting clouds over Katsushika Mizumoto,

subtitles.original: ラプソディー口ずさみ 少し歩こうか
subtitles.english: humming a rhapsody, shall we walk a little?

subtitles.original: カラスが鳴くから もう日が暮れるね
subtitles.english: The crows are cawing, so the sun is already setting, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 焼鳥ほうばり ビール飲もうか
subtitles.english: Let's stuff our cheeks with yakitori and drink beer.

subtitles.original: トンガリ帽子の 取水塔から
subtitles.english: From the pointed-hat intake tower,

subtitles.original: 帝釈天へと 夕陽が落ちる
subtitles.english: the sunset falls toward Taishakuten.
